ready_for_a_new_literary_journey: Ready for a new literary journey?
api_call_limit_reached: You have reached the daily recommendation limit. Please try again tomorrow.
no_more_calls_message: You have exhausted your recommendation quota for today. Please try again in 24 hours.
no_recommended_books_message: No recommendations were found for your preferences. Please try again with different preferences.
processing_recommendations_message: We are preparing your personalized recommendations.
name: Name
choose_your_preferences_and_let_bookmind: Choose your preferences and let BookMind guide you to new literary worlds
what_do_you_want_to_learn: What do you want to learn?
what_do_you_want_to_learn_placeholder: e.g., Learn Python and web development
you_are_a_book_expert_recommend_3_books_: You are a book expert. Recommend 3 books based on preferences. In english.
reset_link_sent: A password reset link has been sent to your email.
unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
error_saving_preferences_or_getting_reco: An error occurred while processing your preferences. Please try again.
empty_reading_list_message: Save books you want to read by tapping the heart icon on any recommendation.
chat_openers: So… what are you in the mood to read?
What kind of book would hit the spot right now?
Where would you want a book to take you today?
If a book could give you one feeling right now, what would it be?
What's pulling at you — what do you want to read about?
chat_anchors: Tell me a book that's stayed with you recently — and what stuck.
What's the last book you really loved (or really didn't)?
Name a book you couldn't put down — or one you wish you hadn't started.
Think of a book you've recommended to someone — what made it special?
What's a book that surprised you lately, for better or worse?
chat_input_required: Need something to work with — write a few words?
chat_input_too_long: Whoa — try to keep it under 500 characters.
chat_error: Something glitched on my end. Mind trying again?
user_not_authenticated: You'll need to sign in to get recommendations.
ai_transparency: Only this chat and your liked books go to OpenAI — no profile, nothing stored. Your reading taste stays yours.
